subject: Claude Code v2.1.212
object: /fork now copies your conversation into a new background session (its own row in claude agents ) while you keep working; the in-session subagent it used to launch is now /subtask

subject: Claude Code v2.1.212
object: Added claude auto-mode reset to restore the default auto-mode configuration, with a confirmation prompt (pass --yes to skip)

subject: Claude Code v2.1.212
object: Added a session-wide limit on WebSearch tool calls (default 200, tunable via CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_WEB_SEARCHES_PER_SESSION ) to stop runaway search loops

subject: Claude Code v2.1.212
object: Added a per-session cap on subagent spawns (default 200, override with CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_SUBAGENTS_PER_SESSION ) to stop runaway delegation loops; /clear resets the budget

subject: Moonshot AI
object: We are releasing PerceptionBench , a benchmark that isolates visual perception and evaluates it as a set of atomic capabilities— discovered from how today's models fail, not defined in advance. By attributing frontier-model failures across 40+ benchmarks to their earliest visual cause, we distill 10 perceptual capabilities and 3,000 verified questions, each answerable by looking, with no reasoning or outside knowledge required.

subject: Moonshot AI
object: The result is a sharp diagnosis rather than one more score. No model we evaluate clears 60% accuracy, and models with nearly identical overall scores can exhibit very different perceptual strengths and weaknesses. More strikingly, a large share of correct answers fail to survive a repeated ask—evidence that current models often guess rather than perceive. PerceptionBench is built to expose exactly where perception breaks, and to drive progress toward multimodal AI that sees faithfully and consistently.

subject: Moonshot AI
object: Overall Model Accuracy

subject: NVIDIA
object: NVIDIA 扩展 Jetson Thor 计算机家族，新增 T3000、T2000 模组 - IT之家

subject: NVIDIA
object: NVIDIA 扩展 Jetson Thor 计算机家族，新增 T3000、T2000 模组

subject: NVIDIA
object: IT之家 7 月 16 日消息，NVIDIA（英伟达）当地时间 15 日宣布扩展其 Jetson Thor 计算机家族，在首期推出的 T5000、T4000 模组之外进一步 新增 T3000、T2000 选项 。

subject: NVIDIA
object: T3000 与 T2000 模组定位“主流中高端”，分别可提供 865 TFLOPS 和 400 TFLOPS 的 FP4 稀疏 AI 算力，起到衔接上代 AGX Orin 和 Jetson T5000 / T4000 产品线的作用。

subject: 因谷歌与美国国防部达成AI合作，DeepMind研究员Alex Turner
object: IT之家 7 月 16 日消息，据 Business Insider 报道，一名谷歌 DeepMind 研究人员表示，他因公司与美国国防部展开合作而选择辞职。

subject: 因谷歌与美国国防部达成AI合作，DeepMind研究员Alex Turner
object: 特纳称，谷歌与美国五角大楼签署协议、允许后者将谷歌人工智能技术用于机密行动后，他做出了辞职决定。

subject: 因谷歌与美国国防部达成AI合作，DeepMind研究员Alex Turner
object: 另一名员工也在 5 月发布了一封内部辞职信，同样提到了谷歌与美国军方关系进一步加深的问题。
